name: Emmaus
oracleText:
Emmaus enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
{2}{W}{U}, {T}: Scry 2. If you control a legendary creature, draw a card.
flavorText: "Did not our heart burn within us?" — Luke 24:32
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Pilgrims of Emmaus on the Road" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.
title: Village of Recognition

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Pilgrims of Emmaus on the Road
classics.sourceNotes: Road-to-Emmaus imagery suits the recognition theme better than a generic supper scene.
